scripts.build: pnpm validate:data && pnpm validate:review && next build
scripts.test: node --no-warnings --test --experimental-strip-types components/shared/modalFocus.test.ts lib/progress/dailyMissions.test.ts lib/progress/recordAnswer.test.ts lib/question-bank/grade.test.ts lib/srs/due.test.ts lib/srs/updateSrs.test.ts lib/storage/progressStorage.test.ts && node scripts/validate-question-data.mjs --self-test && node scripts/validate-review-doc.mjs --self-test
